ledger_classification.rule: Income Tax / TDS ledger must be under Duties & Taxes, not Bank Accounts
ledger_classification.fix: Gateway → Accounts Info → Ledgers → Alter → INCOME TAX & TDS → Change Group to Duties & Taxes

ledger_classification.rule: Investment Redemption is under Investments group, not Bank Accounts
ledger_classification.fix: Gateway → Accounts Info → Ledgers → Alter → Investment Redemption → Change Group to Investments

ledger_classification.rule: Credit card outstanding is a liability (money owed), not an expense
ledger_classification.fix: Gateway → Accounts Info → Ledgers → Alter → Credit Card Membership Fee → Change Group to Sundry Creditors

outstanding.question: Difference in Opening Balances = Rs.6,366,918. This means last year closing balance does not match this year opening balance. Needs investigation.
